prompt: Turn my 'Pantry inventory reset' project into a repeating project that comes back on the 1st of every month.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMArea a ON t.area=a.uuid WHERE t.title='Pantry inventory reset' AND t.type=1 AND t.start=2 AND a.title='Kitchen ops' AND CAST(t.rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>fu</key><integer>8</integer>%' AND CAST(t.rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>dy</key><integer>0</integer>%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask i JOIN TMTask t ON i.rt1_repeatingTemplate=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Pantry inventory reset' AND i.type=1 AND i.rt1_recurrenceRule IS NULL AND i.status=0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Pantry inventory reset' AND rt1_recurrenceRule IS NULL AND rt1_repeatingTemplate IS NULL AND trashed=0

pseudoScript: things project make-repeating "$(things search "Pantry inventory reset" --type project --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --frequency monthly --interval 1 --on-day 1 --dangerously-drive-gui
